project.name: RAGFlow
project.stack: Flask backend, React/TypeScript frontend (UmiJS, Ant Design), Docker Compose, MySQL, Elasticsearch/Infinity, Redis, MinIO; iOS: SwiftUI, GRDB, EPUBKit, PDFKit, NaturalLanguage, Accelerate, marmelroy/Zip

completed: Phase 1–4: All previously complete (P1.1–P1.6, P2, P2.5, iOS live testing phases 1–4)
Phase 5 DONE — DOCX/XLSX/PPTX/EML format expansion
Phase 6 DONE — WorkflowRunner + 5 templates + full UI
Session 2026-03-25: Bug fixes and feature additions from user testing feedback
Session 2026-03-27: Background processing (BGContinuedProcessingTask + UIKit fence)
Session 2026-03-29 (Part 1): Per-KB retrieval settings + doc status indicators + local notifications + XCUITest suite
— KBRetrievalSettingsSheet: topK stepper per KB, stored in SQLite v7 migration
— LibraryView: per-row indexing status badges (ProgressView / green check / orange warning)
— BackgroundTaskCoordinator: UNUserNotificationCenter fires when import/workflow completes while backgrounded
— XCUITest target added to project: 11 click-through UI tests covering all major flows, 11/11 passing
— Commit d52d5d4fb, tag: none
Session 2026-03-29 (Part 2): Enterprise RAG pipeline overhaul (tag: large_update)
— Hybrid RRF retrieval: BM25 (FTS5) + cosine similarity fused with Reciprocal Rank Fusion
RAGService.retrieve(query:kb:) — single entry point using currentQueryEmbedding transient slot
RRF formula: score = Σ 1/(60 + rank_i), normalised, threshold-filtered, top-K returned
— Sentence-boundary chunker (NaturalLanguage NLTokenizer) replaces naive word-split
Oversized single sentences fall back to word-boundary splitting (handles code/CSV)
No more mid-sentence cuts; micro-chunk guard removed (was breaking short test inputs)
— Per-KB RAG settings (DB v8): topK, topN, similarityThreshold, chunkMethod, chunkSize, chunkOverlap
KBRetrievalSettingsSheet: full enterprise panel with Retrieval + Chunking + Pipeline info sections
ChunkMethod enum: General / Q&A / Paper / Table
— Document metadata (DB v8): Book.fileType, pageCount, wordCount, sourceURL on every ingested document
EPUB chapter titles from NCX/TOC (not generic 'Section N'); ingestEPUB uses collectTOC() recursion
PDF: pageCount from PDFDocument.pageCount; all types: wordCount from chunk word count sum
LibraryViewModel.importFromURL() → rag.ingest(url:kbId:sourceURL:) sets sourceURL field
— Enterprise system prompt: shared buildEnterprisePrompt() in LLMService.swift
Used by ClaudeService, OpenAIService, OllamaService (replaces 'reading assistant' / 'book excerpts')
Full document catalog with type/page/word/passage counts; cross-document synthesis instructions
— ChunkSource gains documentTitle field; DatabaseService saves/loads it in message_sources
— LibraryView: document rows show fileType · pages · wordcount · passages
— DocumentDetailView: Passage Viewer (was Chunk Viewer); shows all metadata incl. sourceURL
— ChatViewModel refactored: retrieveChunks() returns ([Chunk], [String:String]) with docTitle lookup
— All tests updated: 11/11 UI tests + 47 unit tests passing
— Commit 4e19c360c, tag: large_update
next_steps: — Ask 'List all documents in this knowledge base with authors and length' — verify all 5 enumerated
— Verify chapter titles in Passage Viewer match actual EPUB TOC (not Section N)
— Verify fileType/pageCount/wordCount/passages shown in document rows
— Q&A chunk method: extract question-answer pairs from FAQ documents
— Reranking: cross-encoder scoring (requires Ollama model with reranking support)
— Knowledge graph / entity extraction for GraphRAG-style querying
— Web crawl ingestion (WKWebView or URLSession HTML fetch + strip)
— P7.1: Fresh install wipe test on real device
— Set DEVELOPMENT_TEAM in Xcode Signing for real-device deployment
— TestFlight: Archive → Distribute → App Store Connect
— Test BGContinuedProcessingTask on real iOS 26 device (not simulatable)

phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase5_formats: COMPLETE — DOCX/XLSX/PPTX via Zip, EML pure Swift
phase_status.iOS_per_kb_retrieval_settings_2026-03-29: COMPLETE — topK, status badges, XCUITest suite (11/11)
phase_status.iOS_enterprise_rag_pipeline_2026-03-29: COMPLETE — hybrid RRF, sentence chunking, per-KB settings, document metadata, enterprise prompt (tag: large_update)

known_gaps.code_signing: DEVELOPMENT_TEAM not set — user must configure in Xcode for real device
known_gaps.workflow_failed: Deep Summarizer shown as 'Failed' — root cause uninvestigated
known_gaps.workflow_categorize: Categorize/Switch step types not implemented — requires branching design
known_gaps.bg_task_simulator: BGContinuedProcessingTask cannot be triggered in Simulator — real device required
known_gaps.streaming_background: LLM streaming cannot use background URLSession — 30s UIKit fence is best achievable
known_gaps.chunk_method_qa_paper_table: ChunkMethod enum exists with UI but only General is wired in ingest; Q&A/Paper/Table behave same as General until specialized parsers added
known_gaps.reranking: No cross-encoder reranking — topN candidates returned as-is after RRF; Ollama reranker integration is next tier
known_gaps.knowledge_graph: GraphRAG/entity extraction not implemented on iOS

last_commit.message: Feat(iOS): enterprise RAG pipeline — hybrid RRF retrieval, sentence chunking, per-KB settings, document metadata
files_changed: ios/RAGFlowMobile/Services/RAG/RAGService.swift (hybrid RRF retrieve, KB-aware ingest, sourceURL overload)
ios/RAGFlowMobile/Services/Storage/DatabaseService.swift (v8 migration, keywordSearchRanked, kb(id:), documentTitle in message_sources)

architecture_notes.retrieval_pipeline: RAGService.retrieve(query:kb:) — hybrid RRF fusing BM25 (FTS5) + cosine (Ollama embeddings via currentQueryEmbedding transient). Normalised score filtered by kb.similarityThreshold, top kb.topK returned. Fallback to pure BM25 when no embeddings.
architecture_notes.chunker: NLTokenizer(unit:.sentence) sentence boundaries → word-grouped windows. Sentences exceeding chunkSize split at word boundaries. Configurable chunkSize/chunkOverlap per KB.
architecture_notes.system_prompt: buildEnterprisePrompt() in LLMService.swift. Shared across Claude/OpenAI/Ollama. Includes full KB catalog (fileType/pages/words/passages) + retrieved passages numbered. Claude gets extra brave_search/jina_reader tool instructions.
architecture_notes.db_migrations: v1 books+chunks+FTS5 | v2 embeddings | v3 knowledge_bases+kbId | v4 messages+message_sources | v5 workflows | v6 chat_sessions+sessionId | v7 topK | v8 topN/chunkMethod/chunkSize/chunkOverlap/similarityThreshold + fileType/pageCount/wordCount/sourceURL + documentTitle
